title: A Book For The King
content:
A book has been made for the King,
    A book of beauty and art;
    To the good king's eyes
    A smile shall rise
    Hiding the ache in his heart - 
    Hiding the hurt and the grief
    As he turns it, leaf by leaf.

    A book has been made for the King,
    A book of blood and of blight;
    To the Great King's eyes
    A look shall rise
    That will blast and wither and smite - 
    Yes, smite with a just God's rage,
    As He turns it, page by page.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ella Wheeler Wilcox, titled "A Book For The King", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
